articles.title: Getting Started with Our Knowledge Base
articles.content:
Welcome to the Knowledge Base
This internal knowledge management system is designed to help our team document, organize, and share important information about our projects, processes, and research findings.

Key Features
Rich text editing with support for images and files
Hierarchical organization through categories
Tag-based classification for easy searching
Draft and published status management
File attachment support
Start creating your first article to contribute to our collective knowledge!
articles.summary: An introduction to using our internal knowledge management system effectively.
articles.author: negin
